output_lXtsVG.name: Notes
output_lXtsVG.value:
"Only negotiate balance billing from Client -- educate only all provider appeals
ERS is never reversed. If there is balance billing the client will change the EOB to show savings as patient responsibility

We will continue to price using ERS, but instead of holding steady, HealthEZ is requesting Zelis to have the option to negotiate up to billed charges on those ground ambulance claims should the provider be unwilling to remove the balance bill. If balance billed or appealed Zelis will attempt to negotiate up to billed charges o	Member cost share payment will NOT be required prior to Zelis negotiating."
output_lXtsVG.executedValue:
"Only negotiate balance billing from Client -- educate only all provider appeals
ERS is never reversed. If there is balance billing the client will change the EOB to show savings as patient responsibility

We will continue to price using ERS, but instead of holding steady, HealthEZ is requesting Zelis to have the option to negotiate up to billed charges on those ground ambulance claims should the provider be unwilling to remove the balance bill. If balance billed or appealed Zelis will attempt to negotiate up to billed charges o	Member cost share payment will NOT be required prior to Zelis negotiating."

"If the provider will not settle at 80% of billed charges and the patient has been balance billed please route to CSS for client direction. **do not route to CSS for direction until 31 business day mark"
